name: Dishonorable Assault
text: Action: During a conflict at this province, discard one or more cards from your hand. Choose an equal number of attacking characters – dishonor each of those characters.

name: Untamed Steppe
text: Action: During a conflict at this province, choose another unbroken province – turn that province facedown.

name: Festival of the Departed
text:
Keeper role only.
During conflicts at this province, characters cannot have their skills increased by the effects of event cards.

name: Hiruma Yoshino
text:
Disguised Bushi.
Action: During a [mil] conflict in which this character is participating, choose a character card in the attacked province – that character contributes its printed [mil] skill towards your side during the resolution of this conflict.

name: Kitsuki Yuikimi
text: Reaction: After you gain a fate from a ring during a conflict in which this character is participating – this character cannot be chosen as the target of your opponent's triggered abilities until the end of the conflict.

name: Akodo Kaede
text:
Immune to opponents' ring effects.
Interrupt: When another character would leave play – remove 1 fate from this character instead.

name: Yogo Preserver
text: Each dishonored character you control gains sincerity.

name: Benevolent Ambassador
text:
Courtesy. (When this character leaves play, gain 1 fate.)
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict – you and your opponent each gain 1 honor.

name: Utaku Rumaru
text:
Each honored character you control gets +1 glory. Each dishonored character you control gets -1 glory.
Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, discard a card from your hand. Choose another participating character – honor that character.

name: Fury of the Damned
text:
Fire role only.
Action: During a conflict, choose any number of participating Bushi characters you control – double the base [mil] skill of each of those characters until the end of the conflict. At the end of the conflict, sacrifice each of those characters.

name: Arbiter of Authority
text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [pol] duel – your opponent may dishonor his or her character to refuse the duel. Otherwise, resolve the duel. Bow and move home the duel's loser.

name: A New Name
text:
Void role only.
Attached character gains the Bushi and Courtier traits.

name: Duel to the Death
text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [mil] duel – your opponent may dishonor his or her character to refuse the duel. Otherwise, resolve the duel. Discard the duel's loser.

name: Niten Pupil
text:
Water role only.
Reaction: After honor dials are revealed for a duel, if this character is involved in the duel – double this character's base [mil] and [pol] skills until the end of the phase.

name: Two-Heavens Technique
text:
Attach to a Bushi character.
While there are exactly 2 Weapon attachments on attached character, attached character gains covert.

name: Forebearer's Echoes
text:
Air role only.
Action: During a [mil] conflict, choose a character in your dynasty discard pile – put that character into play in the conflict. If that character is still in play at the end of the conflict, put it on the bottom of your dynasty deck.

name: Isawa Tadaka
text:
and  clan only.
Disguised Shugenja.
Action: During a conflict, remove one or more characters in your dynasty discard pile from the game – look at that many random cards from your opponent's hand. Choose and discard one of those cards.

name: Earth Becomes Sky
text:
Earth role only.
Reaction: After a character an opponent controls is readied – bow that character.

name: Alluring Patron
text:
Fire role only.
Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose a character your opponent controls in his or her home. Your opponent selects one – either move that character to the conflict, or dishonor it.

name: Softskin
text: Attached character cannot ready unless its controller discards the top 3 cards of his or her conflict deck.

name: Unfulfilled Duty
text:
Earth role only.
Action: Choose any number of characters with no fate that have a total printed cost of 6 or lower – ready each of those characters.
